title: Assertion fault on a conditional row-value expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 INT, value3 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, 2, 'A');
INSERT INTO test_table (value1, value2, value3) VALUES (2, 3, NULL);
SELECT 1 WHERE value1 >= 1 AND value1 <= 3 AND value2 >= 2 AND value2 <= 4;
SELECT CASE WHEN value1 = 1 AND value2 = 2 THEN 'Matched' ELSE 'Not Matched' END FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Assertion fault on row-value expressions in SQLite
